mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly increasing present valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rates exceeding 6.0 percent signal severe labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending and corporate earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or out-of-sample hit rate falls below 45% over 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in real sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and housing demand recovery, driving positive quarterly equity returns through earnings expansion.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth during monetary tightening cycles reflects resilient supply-side capacity that outpaces demand destruction, generating positive short-term equity momentum over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO momentum turns negative or insignificant during tightening regimes, or 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with supply growth.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained CPI readings above 215 trigger aggressive central bank tightening expectations that compress equity multiples and reduce risk appetite, causing negative forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when CPI exceeds 215, or the negative predictive power vanishes in out-of-sample periods with high inflation.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where payroll employment rises while unemployment falls confirms genuine labor market tightening that supports wage growth and corporate profitability, yielding positive 20-day equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS/UNRATE signal fails to produce a positive hit rate above 55% in out-of-sample testing, or interaction term loses statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly expands corporate revenue bases and profit margins, translating into positive quarterly S&P 500 returns through fundamental earnings channels over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows zero or negative correlation with 60-day forward returns in walk-forward validation, or Rank IC stays below 0.02 across all tested windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 105 signals severe supply-side contraction and weakening economic activity that triggers negative short-term equity momentum over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 65% of instances when INDPRO drops below 105, or the threshold signal loses predictive power in out-of-sample recession periods.
